source_description: Audit-only mission producing a prioritized backlog of follow-up missions to bring packages/admin (the schema-driven admin SPA) into alignment with the current Waaseyaa framework. Covers framework alignment drift across the full v1.x lifetime, feature coverage gaps against the L2-L6 package list, dependency/tooling staleness, and package envelope/boundary health. Outputs docs/audits/admin-spa-modernization-2026-05-10.md plus GitHub follow-up issues with Track milestones. No code changes inside packages/admin and no backend changes.
